title: Details Emerge in Kyle Busch Death Investigation
summary: New details are revealed from the 911 call related to Kyle Busch's death during a visit to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The death of a prominent NASCAR driver brings attention to safety and security in the Charlotte area.

title: Wegmans Announces Charlotte Store Opening Date
summary: Wegmans grocery store chain announces the opening date for its first store in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: The arrival of Wegmans provides new shopping options and potential economic benefits for Charlotte residents.

title: Virginia Baseball Heads to ACC Tournament in Charlotte
summary: Virginia baseball team is the No. 8 seed in the ACC tournament, which will be held in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The ACC tournament brings regional sports competition and tourism to Charlotte.

title: Sports on TV: ACC Tournament in Charlotte
summary: TV schedule includes the Atlantic Coast Tournament: Duke vs. NC State, First Round, Charlotte, N.C.
charlotte_impact: Local sports events are broadcast, increasing visibility for Charlotte.

title: NC NAACP Defends President on Interim Mayor Stance
summary: North Carolina NAACP defends Corine Mack's opposition to White interim mayor candidates in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Racial tensions and political debates are highlighted in Charlotte's leadership selection.

title: Retirement Planning Film Features Charlotte Expert
summary: Keith Helmendach of HK Solutions featured in 'Retirement Everest,' a film examining retirement risks.
charlotte_impact: Financial planning and retirement security are important topics for Charlotte residents.

title: Charlotte Weekend Weather: Rain to Sunshine
summary: Scattered downpours expected today, but Sunday will improve with sunshine and temperatures near 76 degrees.
charlotte_impact: Weather patterns affect daily life and outdoor activities in Charlotte.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks associated with construction and the importance of consumer protection.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman
summary: A Shelby police officer was suspended for punching a woman during an arrest. The officer was not identified.
charlotte_impact: Police misconduct and accountability are critical issues in the community.

title: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Filed in Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife files a wrongful death lawsuit related to a fatal plane crash at Statesville Regional Airport.
charlotte_impact: The lawsuit raises questions about negligence and safety in aviation.

title: Thieves Target Clover Neighborhood Again
summary: Thieves break into multiple vehicles in Clover neighborhood for the second time, stealing at least one gun.
charlotte_impact: Repeated break-ins raise concerns about community safety and security.

title: Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges
summary: Salisbury teacher turns himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Child safety and abuse are serious concerns in the educational system.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Expansion
summary: FAA awards Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand airport apron, part of a nationwide infrastructure upgrade.
charlotte_impact: Airport expansion improves transportation and economic development in Charlotte.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run
summary: Man dies 10 months after a hit-and-run in north Charlotte. Police seek information on the unknown driver.
charlotte_impact: Hit-and-run incidents highlight the need for road safety and justice.

title: Hit-and-Run Suspect Arrested After Child Struck
summary: CMPD arrests Shaiquailalia Harris for felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a car in south Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The arrest brings some closure but emphasizes the dangers to children near schools.
